name: Low-Mileage Heavy Vehicle Exemption

eligibility.description: Available to owners of vehicles with a taxable gross weight of 55,000+ lbs that do not exceed specific mileage thresholds on public roads.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Heavy highway motor vehicles used for less than 5,000 miles (7,500 miles for agricultural vehicles) on public highways during a taxable period are exempt from the heavy vehicle use tax.
